ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "tech" INTEGER /* Technology level of the character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "HPFactor" INTEGER /* Base health point factor */,
  "HPFactor2" INTEGER /* Secondary health point factor */,
  "MPFactor" INTEGER /* Base mana point factor */,
  "MPFactor2" INTEGER /* Secondary mana point factor */,
  "resistanceFactor" INTEGER /* Resistance factor against damage */,
  "toughnessFactor" REAL /* Toughness factor against critical hits */,
  "dodgeFactor" REAL /* Dodge factor for evading attacks */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the character is enabled in the game */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock keeping unit for the character */,
  "shortDesc" TEXT /* Short description of the character */,
  "longDesc" TEXT /* Long description of the character */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "reputation" INTEGER /* Reputation of the character */,
  "intelligence" INTEGER /* Intelligence of the character */,
  "charisma" INTEGER /* Charisma of the character */,
  "agility" INTEGER /* Agility of the character */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the character */,
  "luck" INTEGER /* Luck of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_tech FOREIGN KEY ("tech") REFERENCES character_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the character type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "HPModifier" INTEGER /* Health point modification */,
  "MPModifier" INTEGER /* Mana point modification */,
  "resistanceModifier" INTEGER /* Resistance modification */,
  "toughnessModifier" INTEGER /* Toughness modification */,
  "dodgeModifier" INTEGER /* Dodge modification */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the equipment is enabled in the game */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock keeping unit for the equipment */,
  "shortDesc" TEXT /* Short description of the equipment */,
  "longDesc" TEXT /* Long description of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the equipment */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the equipment */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_equipment" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipped item */,
  "equipped_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was equipped */,
  "slot" TEXT /* Slot where the item is equipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "HP" INTEGER /* Health points of the ship */,
  "MP" INTEGER /* Mana points of the ship */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the ship */,
  "cargo_capacity" INTEGER /* Cargo capacity of the ship */,
  "weapon_slots" INTEGER /* Number of weapon slots available */,
  "shield_strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the ship's shield */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the ship is enabled in the game */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock keeping unit for the ship */,
  "shortDesc" TEXT /* Short description of the ship */,
  "longDesc" TEXT /* Long description of the ship */,
  "ship_type" TEXT /* Type of the ship */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel capacity of the ship */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_upgrades" (
  "upgrade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship upgrade */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the upgrade */,
  "HPModifier" INTEGER /* Health point modification */,
  "MPModifier" INTEGER /* Mana point modification */,
  "speedModifier" REAL /* Speed modification */,
  "cargoCapacityModifier" INTEGER /* Cargo capacity modification */,
  "weaponSlotModifier" INTEGER /* Weapon slot modification */,
  "shieldStrengthModifier" INTEGER /* Shield strength modification */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the upgrade is enabled in the game */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock keeping unit for the upgrade */,
  "shortDesc" TEXT /* Short description of the upgrade */,
  "longDesc" TEXT /* Long description of the upgrade */,
  "upgrade_type" TEXT /* Type of the upgrade */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the upgrade */,
  "prerequisite_upgrade_id" INTEGER /* Prerequisite upgrade ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upgrade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_upgrades_applied" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship */,
  "upgrade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applied upgrade */,
  "applied_date" TEXT /* Date when the upgrade was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id", "upgrade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the game */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience points earned by the player */,
  "reputation" INTEGER /* Reputation of the player */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Credits owned by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_characters" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned character */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the character was assigned to the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_ships" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned ship */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the ship was assigned to the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., combat, trade, exploration) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "impact_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event's impact */,
  "impact_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event's impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event impact */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game event */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affected character */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affected ship */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Description of the effect on the character or ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_impact_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_impact_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_impact_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_progress" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience points earned by the player */,
  "reputation" INTEGER /* Reputation of the player */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Credits owned by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "game_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_progress" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character */,
  "reputation" INTEGER /* Reputation of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "game_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_progress" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "cargo" INTEGER /* Cargo in the ship */,
  "fuel" REAL /* Fuel level of the ship */,
  "damage" INTEGER /* Damage to the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id", "game_date")
)
